auth.label: Bot Token
auth.description: Create a new bot with @BotFather using /newbot, then paste the generated token here. Telegram documents BotFather at https://core.telegram.org/bots/features#botfather.

actions.name: answer_callback_query
actions.description: Answer an inline keyboard callback query.

callbackQueryId.description: The callback query ID to answer.

text.description: The notification text to show to the user.

showAlert.description: Whether to show an alert instead of a notification.

url.description: The URL to open for the callback query.

cacheTime.description: The maximum time in seconds that the result may be cached client-side.

success.description: Whether the Telegram Bot API request succeeded.

actions.name: approve_chat_join_request
actions.description: Approve a user's pending request to join a Telegram chat.

anyOf.description: A numeric Telegram chat identifier.
A numeric Telegram chat identifier encoded as a string.
A Telegram @username for a public chat or channel.

chatId.description: The target Telegram chat ID or channel username.

userId.description: The user identifier from the join request.

success.description: Whether the Telegram Bot API request succeeded.

actions.name: ban_chat_member
actions.description: Ban a user from a group, supergroup, or channel.

anyOf.description: A numeric Telegram chat identifier.
A numeric Telegram chat identifier encoded as a string.
A Telegram @username for a public chat or channel.

chatId.description: The target Telegram chat ID or channel username.

untilDate.description: The Unix timestamp when the ban ends.

revokeMessages.description: Whether to delete all messages from the banned user.

success.description: Whether the Telegram Bot API request succeeded.

actions.name: copy_message
actions.description: Copy one message without linking back to the original message.

anyOf.description: A numeric Telegram chat identifier.
A numeric Telegram chat identifier encoded as a string.
A Telegram @username for a public chat or channel.

chatId.description: The target Telegram chat ID or channel username.

anyOf.description: A numeric Telegram chat identifier.
A numeric Telegram chat identifier encoded as a string.
A Telegram @username for a public chat or channel.

fromChatId.description: The target Telegram chat ID or channel username.

parseMode.description: The parse mode used for message entities.

showCaptionAboveMedia.description: Whether to show the replacement caption above the media.

disableNotification.description: Whether to copy the message silently.

protectContent.description: Whether to protect the copied message from forwarding and saving.

actions.name: copy_messages
actions.description: Copy 1-100 messages without links to the originals while preserving album grouping.

anyOf.description: A numeric Telegram chat identifier.

A Telegram @username for a public chat or channel.

fromChatId.description: The target Telegram chat ID or channel username.

disableNotification.description: Whether to deliver the messages silently.

protectContent.description: Whether to protect the messages from forwarding and saving.

removeCaption.description: Whether to remove captions from copied messages.

actions.name: create_chat_invite_link
actions.description: Create an additional Telegram chat invite link with optional expiry or approval rules.

anyOf.description: A numeric Telegram chat identifier.
A numeric Telegram chat identifier encoded as a string.
A Telegram @username for a public chat or channel.

chatId.description: The target Telegram chat ID or channel username.

expireDate.description: The Unix timestamp when the link expires.

memberLimit.description: The maximum number of simultaneous members using the link.

createsJoinRequest.description: Whether users joining through the link require administrator approval.

outputSchema.description: A Telegram chat invite link record.

actions.name: decline_chat_join_request
actions.description: Decline a user's pending request to join a Telegram chat.

A Telegram @username for a public chat or channel.

chatId.description: The target Telegram chat ID or channel username.

success.description: Whether the Telegram Bot API request succeeded.

actions.description: Validate the bot token and return the bot profile from Telegram Bot API.

actions.name: get_updates
actions.description: Poll pending updates for the bot. Use this only when webhook delivery is disabled or for debugging.

limit.description: The maximum number of updates to return.

actions.name: get_webhook_info
actions.description: Return the webhook status configured for the bot.

actions.name: promote_chat_member

anyOf.description: A numeric Telegram chat identifier.
A numeric Telegram chat identifier encoded as a string.
A Telegram @username for a public chat or channel.

chatId.description: The target Telegram chat ID or channel username.

canManageChat.description: Whether the administrator can access general chat management features.

canDeleteMessages.description: Whether the administrator can delete other users' messages.

canManageVideoChats.description: Whether the administrator can manage video chats.

canRestrictMembers.description: Whether the administrator can restrict or ban members.

canPromoteMembers.description: Whether the administrator can appoint other administrators.

canChangeInfo.description: Whether the administrator can change chat information.

canInviteUsers.description: Whether the administrator can invite users.

canPostStories.description: Whether the administrator can post stories.

canEditStories.description: Whether the administrator can edit stories.

canDeleteStories.description: Whether the administrator can delete stories.

canPostMessages.description: Whether the administrator can post channel messages.

canEditMessages.description: Whether the administrator can edit channel messages.

canPinMessages.description: Whether the administrator can pin messages.

canManageTopics.description: Whether the administrator can manage forum topics.

canManageDirectMessages.description: Whether the administrator can manage channel direct messages.

canManageTags.description: Whether the administrator can manage member tags.

success.description: Whether the Telegram Bot API request succeeded.
